purpose: Seed anchor + per-slot role. When AUTO_COMMIT_ENABLED is True, slots drift via accepted mutations. The `role` field keeps each slot anchored to a distinct coverage lane so mutations cannot wander into an adjacent slot's territory or leave the mission. The `seed_query` is the original query captured on `captured_at` — used for drift checks and rollback targets.
mission: Skill-foundry intelligence pipeline — surface MCP servers, agent skills, workflow tools, and pipeline components that should exist but don't yet.

agents.tool_monitor: GitHub repo search — targets MCP/agent/LLM-tooling repos.
agents.youtube: YouTube video search — targets agent/MCP tutorial, demo, and review content.
agents.perplexity: Perplexity Sonar synthesis — time-bounded questions returning synthesized answers.
agents.gemini_research: Gemini grounded search — search instructions returning ranked source results.

TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[0].role: MCP server reference implementations — newly released or updated MCP server repos that implement the protocol itself.

TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[1].role: MCP-to-service bridges — repos wrapping a specific external service, API, or SaaS as an MCP server.

TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[2].role: Agent skill & plugin frameworks — reusable capability registries where developers register skills, plugins, or tools for agents.

TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[3].role: Multi-agent orchestration engines — workflow and pipeline frameworks that coordinate multiple agents in sequence or parallel.

TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[4].role: Tool-use primitives & SDKs — low-level function-calling or tool-use libraries that sit below MCP in the stack.
TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[4].seed_query: LLM function calling tool use library

TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[5].role: Language-specific MCP SDKs — Python, TypeScript, or other-language MCP client-server bindings.
TOOL_SEARCH_QUERIES[5].seed_query: MCP SDK typescript python client binding

YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[0].role: MCP server build tutorials — step-by-step 'build your own MCP server' content, hands-on tutorials.

YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[1].role: Agent framework launches & demos — announcement videos and walkthroughs for newly launched agent frameworks.

YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[2].role: Claude ecosystem deep-dives — Anthropic and Claude-specific MCP, skills, and agent content.
YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[2].seed_query: Claude MCP model context protocol deep dive 2026

YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[3].role: Agent workflow architecture — videos on designing multi-step agent pipelines and orchestration patterns.
YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[3].seed_query: AI agent workflow architecture pipeline design 2026

YOUTUBE_SEARCH_QUERIES[4].role: Dev-productivity agent tool reviews — comparisons, benchmarks, and demos of coding agents as developer productivity tools.

PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[0].role: Weekly MCP release digest — synthesized summary of MCP servers and integrations that shipped in the past week.
PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[0].seed_query: Which MCP servers or Model Context Protocol integrations shipped this week, and what capabilities do they add?

PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[1].role: Unmet agent skill demand — developers' explicit requests for tools, skills, or integrations that do not yet exist as shipped products.
PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[1].seed_query: Which agent skills, plugins, or tool-use integrations are developers explicitly requesting that don't yet exist as shipped tools?

PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[2].role: Workflow & pipeline tool launches — synthesized list of new agent workflow or pipeline automation tools launched this week.
PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[2].seed_query: Which new workflow or pipeline automation tools for AI agents launched this week?

PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[3].role: API wrapping patterns — which external APIs or SaaS services developers are wrapping as MCP or agent tools, and the underlying motivation.
PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[3].seed_query: Which external APIs or SaaS services are developers wrapping as MCP servers or agent tools right now, and what drives the choice?

PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[4].role: Ecosystem friction & complaints — active pain points and missing features developers are complaining about in the Claude, ChatGPT, or AI coding agent ecosystems.
PERPLEXITY_RESEARCH_QUERIES[4].seed_query: What specific pain points or missing features are developers actively complaining about in the Claude, ChatGPT, or AI coding agent ecosystems this week?

GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[0].role: MCP integration release sources — direct search results for freshly released MCP servers or protocol integrations.
GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[0].seed_query: Search for MCP server or Model Context Protocol integration release announcements published in the last 7 days.

GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[1].role: Agent framework release sources — direct search results for new agent frameworks, SDKs, or orchestration libraries.
GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[1].seed_query: Search for AI agent framework, SDK, or orchestration library releases announced in the last 7 days.

GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[2].role: Trending agent skill repos — GitHub repositories implementing MCP or agent skills that are gaining momentum (not just newly created).
GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[2].seed_query: Search for GitHub repositories implementing MCP servers or agent skill plugins that gained stars or traction in the last 7 days.

GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[3].role: Workflow automation launch sources — direct search results for new agent workflow or pipeline automation tool launches.
GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[3].seed_query: Search for new agent workflow or pipeline automation tool launches published in the last 7 days.

GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[4].role: Long-form gap discussions — blog posts, forum threads, and developer discussions about missing MCP integrations or unbuilt agent skills.
GEMINI_RESEARCH_QUERIES[4].seed_query: Search for blog posts, forum threads, or developer discussions from the last 7 days about missing MCP integrations or unbuilt agent skills.
